steps.title: Identify the relative clause type
steps.content: ”One European city” calls for a restrictive clause that identifies which city — the one many travelers recommend.

steps.title: Apply the restrictive clause rule
steps.content:
Restrictive clauses use “that” with no comma: “city that many travelers recommend.” Option A adds an incorrect comma before “that”; option B uses “which” with comma (non-restrictive), treating the info as extra rather than identifying; option C uses “in which,” which doesn't work with “recommend.”
That matches choice D — D is correct.
